items.title: [正面] So far i'm liking the game! Yeah there's gacha whi...
items.summary: So far i'm liking the game! Yeah there's gacha which many dislike but as someone who was a full time mobile game enjoyer years ago I don't mind it, just makes you better at resource management. Every 6  full pulls (so 30 draws) guarantees a SSR so rates are pretty good but it may not be the target. There's also try out character parts that grant draw materials so go use those for the normal character pool. I got a zombie maid and then used the free SSR unlock to get the other poison character for a sweet poison comp. Just give it a real shot because there's a lot missed among all the clutter. The only downside is some translation errors but it's pretty common for non native games anyway.
